message:
perf(db): Arc-share cached rows, batch inbox_stats rebuild, fix search_v3 metric name

cache.rs: Wrap ProjectRow and AgentRow in Arc so dual-index entries
(by-slug + by-human-key for projects, by-key + by-id for agents)
share one heap allocation instead of cloning.  Warm paths pre-build
Arc entries to eliminate redundant clones during bulk inserts.  New
tests verify ptr_eq between dual-index entries.

queries.rs: Replace per-agent loop of DELETE+INSERT in
rebuild_agent_inbox_stats_in_tx with a single batched
rebuild_agents_inbox_stats_in_tx that deduplicates agent IDs and
chunks IN-clause parameters to stay within SQLite's bind limit.
Callers (create_message_with_recipients, mark_message_read,
mark_messages_read_batch, mark_all_messages_read_in_project,
acknowledge_message, cleanup_committed_message) all migrated.
release_reservations_by_ids_matching_expiry merged the probe SELECT
and release INSERT into a single INSERT-WHERE-EXISTS to halve the
round-trip count.  New test exercises the chunked rebuild path with
SQLITE_MAX_BIND_PARAMS+1 recipients.

search_v3.rs: Fix metric field name from `index_size_bytes` to
`tantivy_index_size_bytes` to match the actual metrics struct.
Fix variable shadowing bug where `db_url` was used instead of `input`
in fallback branches of the test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
